theme: Jarayonlar, signallar, systemd servislar, journald loglar

tasks.title: LAB I — Jarayonlar va signallar
tasks.desc: ps aux, top, sleep & (fonda), jobs, pgrep, kill. Nechta jarayon ishlayapti?

tasks.title: LAB II — systemd & journald (real servislar)
tasks.desc: systemctl status devops-quizbot/cron/ssh + journalctl -u. Faqat status, restart qilma.

tasks.title: SECRET — log ichidagi sir
tasks.desc: grep -rl 'SECRET{' ~/devops bilan faylni top, SECRET{...} ni ustozga ayt.

tasks.title: 🐍 Python Drop — funksiyalar
tasks.desc: days/day-03/work/day03.py: status() funksiya + servislar dict'iga qo'lla.

tasks.title: 🇬🇧 English Drop
tasks.desc: 5 so'z (process, service, restart, crash, log) + 2 jumla inglizcha.

tasks.title: 💻 Shell Drill — ps + sort
tasks.desc: Eng ko'p CPU ishlatayotgan 3 jarayonni bir qatorda chiqar (ps aux --sort).

tasks.title: Tushuntirib ber
tasks.desc: SIGTERM va SIGKILL farqini + systemctl status nimalarni ko'rsatishini ustozga ayt.
